name: @forgeax/bevy-scale
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `transforms/scale` example: a rotated cube grows along one bounded scale axis, reverses at its maximum, and cycles to the next axis at its minimum through createApp's managed Time update loop.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: demo-specific fps evidence belongs to its completed reproduction

bench.reason: demo-specific benchmarks belong to its completed reproduction

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy example reproduction
